name: Gil Maman
bio: Gil spent more than six years in Israeli Military Intelligence, where he held multiple technical leadership roles spanning advanced cyber R&D, operational security engineering, and leading multidisciplinary teams developing high-impact cyber capabilities. Gil began his career as a self-taught developer at age 11 and later became a founding engineer at several startups, building products and infrastructure from the ground up. His background also includes academic research in static analysis and software integrity, with a recent focus on how AI-driven automation introduces new classes of security risks.
